name: Capital One VentureOne Rewards for Good Credit
title: Capital One VentureOne Rewards for Good Credit (Capital One)
text:
Card: Capital One VentureOne Rewards for Good Credit (Capital One)
Best no-annual-fee travel card
Pros: No annual fee,Earn 1.25 miles per dollar on all purchases,No foreign transaction fees
Cons: Other credit cards can offer you higher rewards for your common purchase categories,No welcome bonus or introductory APR offer
Why we chose it: The world of points, miles and travel rewards features a variety of cards that often feature hefty annual fees and require excellent credit. Luckily for many budding travelers, other options exist. Enter the Capital One VentureOne Rewards for Good Credit; cardholders who don't have excellent credit may find that this card is a great alternative to the VentureOne Rewards though it's worth noting that VentureOne Rewards for Good Credit does not come with a welcome bonus. Luckily, with its flat rate earning and lack of annual fee, this is a good contender as an introductory travel credit card.
Who it's good for: The VentureOne Rewards for Good Credit is a solid card for those getting started in the points, miles and cash back game who also have good credit but haven't quite reached the 'excellent' credit level. It offers the ability to earn transferable travel rewards and comes with no annual fee.
Annual fee: $0
Rewards: 1.25 - 5X miles
APR: N/A,N/A,28.99% (Variable),28.99% (Variable),None,28.99% (Variable)
Review: https://thepointsguy.com/credit-cards/capital-one/
